Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Court Order, Or A Court-Issued Subpoena, To Compel Deposition Of Michael Gallin; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANTS JAK MARQUEZ, and DOWLING & MARQUEZ, LLP's Motion For A Court Order, Or A Court-Issued Subpoena, To Compel Deposition Of Michael Gallin.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion Granted. No opposition. Michael Gallin is ordered to appear for deposition no later than January 7, 2025. Defendants must submit a proposed order to Department 302 no later than 10:00 a.m. on January 3, 2025 which sets forth the date and time of the deposition and location if in person or the Zoom link to be used. The order must be served on Mr. Gallin and counsel for plaintiff via email no later than 5:00 p.m. January 3, 2025.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/MEW)

***After hearing, an order is signed.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records Issued To Sirkinlaw Apc; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-07-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Gregory M. Smith, Esq., THE MALONEY FIRM, APC (310) 540-1505 gsmith@maloneyfirm.com Attorney for Plaintiff BARBARA P. FEDUN, INDIVIDUALLY, AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE BARBARA P. FEDUN TRUST
Inna Nytochka, Esq., WILSON, ELSER, MOSKOWITZ, EDELMAN & DICKER LLP (415) 433-0990 inna.nytochka@wilsonelser.com Attorneys for Defendant Dowling & Marquez, LLP and Jak Marquezfor Defendant.

Matter not properly contested. Counsel for plaintiff is reminded that personal appearances are required if the matter is constested. Notice of contest was not provided to Defendnat's counsel or Court. Court allows argument.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JAK MARQUEZ, DOWLING & MARQUEZ, LLP Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records Issued To Sirkinlaw Apc

The Motion is granted. Plaintiff impliedly waived attorney client privilege. Sirkin shall comply with the subpoena and produce all requested records.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (525/JPT)
